title: Cops Discover Predator Dad's RV of Horrors

beats.description: Chaotic opening bodycam audio of distressed parents and first responders at the gas station.
Narrator introduces the case, location, and initial premise of an infant's medical emergency.
Police interact with the parents, noticing suspicious injuries and the father's volatile behavior.
Tension peaks as officers decide to detain the father, leading to a physical arrest and transport.
Separate interrogations uncover a history of domestic abuse, meth use, and financial control.
Investigators present medical evidence and past incidents that contradict the parents' accident claims.
Mounting forensic details and the older child's statement intensify the case against the father.
The infant's death is announced, followed by legal outcomes, sentencing, and investigator reflections.
